title: Zaldasan's Awasome vanilla
description: Light weight and optimized vanilla+ experience with few QoL and furniture Mods
body:
My vanilla+ is designed for people wanting expirience of basic minecraft with just few modifcations
Such as

- Jade
- JEI
- McCrayfishes Furniture Mod
- Handcrafted
- Farmer`s Delight
- And more!
  
Its also designed to work with multiplayer in mind!

VR support soon
